svg.aria-label: OWASP Top 10:2025 new Software Supply Chain Failures and Cryptographic Failures entries replacing legacy categories, agentic AI attack surface with prompt injection and insecure output handling, updated DevSecOps pipeline hardening requirements.
svg.title: 2026-01-03: OWASP Top 10 2025 supply chain failures, agentic AI security

g.text: A08 Software Supply Chain Failures : new 2025...
SBOM generation : dependency pin : signed artefacts :...
Generate SBOM in CI : pin to hash not tag : Sigstore sign...
LLM01 prompt injection in agentic chains : tool...
Output validation : agent scope restriction : approval...
Validate LLM output before tool call : restrict agent...
Weak cipher suites : outdated TLS : hardcoded...
TLS 1.3 enforce : HSTS preload : secrets vault rotation
Upgrade to TLS 1.3 : HSTS preload header : rotate secrets...
